use_cases: Displaying project status messages with variant-based color coding (success, warning, error)
Showing system notifications or alerts at the top of a page
Communicating important announcements with optional call-to-action links
Providing visual feedback for user actions or system states
Replacing browser alerts with styled inline banners
ai_summary: A lightweight status banner component that displays contextual messages using color-coded variants (success, warning, error). Features an optional icon, label text, and call-to-action link for user engagement. Designed with accessibility in mind using semantic HTML (aside element) and responsive layout that adapts between mobile and desktop viewports.
